summary: First review catches one persistent issue and one extra issue.

findings.title: Context packet misses stale-memory invalidation note
findings.evidence: Packet summary omits any stale-memory classification.
findings.explanation: A later run could reuse obsolete findings without an explicit invalidation signal.

findings.title: Aggressive mode may over-strip prose
findings.evidence: Aggressive mode removes common articles globally.
findings.explanation: That can damage clarity in technical sentences.
